case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES-BDC VS DOMINGO, DIVINA C.

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 432892 FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES-BDC AS TO DEFENDANT DOMINGO, DIVINA C.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES-BDC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOMINGO, DIVINA C. $1,088.97 PRINCIPAL, $806.65 INTEREST, $14.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,909.62, RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT DATED JAN. 9, 1985. CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $264.94. BAL OF $1644.68. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
